studies.title: Randomized controlled clinical trial of the efficacy of the digital self-help program edupression.com® in mild-to-moderate unipolar depressive patients
studies.health_condition:
ICD-10-GM (translation):
F32.0 - Mild depressive episode
ICD-10-GM (translation):
F33.0 - Recurrent depressive disorder, current episode mild
ICD-10-GM (translation):
F32.1 - Moderate depressive episode
ICD-10-GM (translation):
F33.1 - Recurrent depressive disorder, current episode moderate
Healthy
studies.brief_summary:
The purpose of this clinical study is to investigate the effectiveness of the self-help program edupression.com® in the treatment of a mild to moderately severe depressive episode. In addition, it will be investigated which factors influence the usage behavior of depressive patients. edupression.com® is an intelligent self-help program for depressive patients. 
edupression.com® consists of two digital medical devices that are CE certified in the EU and will be provided to patients free of charge in a single intelligent self-help program as part of this study. Participants eligible for the study will be randomly assigned to one of two study groups: a control group and an intervention group. The intervention group will receive full access to edupression.com® for 12 weeks. This intervention includes all medical products of edupression.com®: psychoeducation with elements of cognitive behavioral psychotherapy (learning content and exercises) and a mood chart (monitoring of depression sympto
studies.intervention:
Arm 1:
Intervention arm: Psychoeducation with elements of CBT & mood chart
Patients will receive full access to edupression.com® immediately after randomization. This intervention involves all medicinal products of edupression.com®: psychoeducation with elements of CBT (learning content and exercises) and a mood chart (depression symptom monitoring).
Arm 2:
Active control arm: (Occupational) health interventions and symptom monitoring
These patients will also receive an edupression.com® account
